task_completion.description: The document is saved as vendor_agreement_final.docx.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar of the word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) displays 'vendor_agreement_final.docx' or a file manager shows this file created in /home/ga/Documents/.

task_completion.description: The document has a consistent heading hierarchy and corrected paragraph alignment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Headings are uniformly styled (e.g., consistent font size and weight for main sections vs subsections). Paragraphs are neatly aligned (e.g., consistently justified or left-aligned) without jagged or irregular margins.
The text uses the defined short form 'Vendor' consistently. Inconsistent aliases like 'Meridian Tech' or 'MERIDIAN' should no longer be visible in the body paragraphs.

task_completion.description: The Definitions section is completed with the required terms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Definitions' section is visible and explicitly lists and defines the terms 'Deliverables', 'Service Level Agreement', and 'Term'.

task_completion.description: The deliverables table is professionally formatted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table containing deliverables is visible with clear borders, distinct header rows, and properly aligned text, looking neat and professional.

task_completion.description: Spurious bold or italic formatting is removed from the text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Standard body paragraphs do not contain random, out-of-place bold or italicized words (excluding standard headings or defined terms).

task_completion.description: A signature block is present at the end of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The end of the document features a signature block with lines/spaces for both 'CloudFirst Industries, LLC' and 'Meridian Technology Solutions, Inc.' to sign.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a word processing application (like LibreOffice Writer) open with the document, rather than just terminal commands or a plain text editor.

integrity.description: The agent actively edited the document rather than downloading a pre-made solution.
integrity.visual_evidence: Intermediate screenshots show text selection, formatting menus open, typing, or cursor movement within the document.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to bypass manual formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal does not show python scripts or automated command-line tools being executed to generate the final .docx file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Client Name: CloudFirst Industries, LLC. Vendor Name: Meridian Technology Solutions, Inc. The defined short form for the vendor is 'Vendor'. The draft contains inconsistent names ('Meridian Tech', 'MERIDIAN', 'Meridian Technology Solutions') which must be standardized. The Definitions section must explicitly include 'Deliverables', 'Service Level Agreement', and 'Term'. The document contains exactly 8 sections.
